title: Sub-Chapter 10. Enrollment: Non-College Degree (NCD) - LTS Data Entry Rules
description: This section gives you step-by-step directions on how to add an Non-college degree that is not from an institution of higher learning to the enrollment screen in the Long Term Solution.
